articles.title: Tiger Woods Arrest Body Cam Footage Shows Him Telling Police He's 'Hoping' to Golf in the Masters: 'Depends on Y'all' - Yahoo Sports Australia
articles.description: Woods is facing charges of DUI with property damage, careless driving and refusal to submit to a lawful test after he was involved in a crash earlier this...
articles.content:
• Newly released body cam footage shows Tiger Woods joking with officers and expressing concern about being seen at the site after he was involved in a rollover crash on March 27
